results.summary: The actual screenshot closely matches the wireframe in overall layout and style, including the docked tutorial window, map, and key. However, there are mismatches in content details, button labels, phase naming, and map elements, indicating some deviations from the expected wireframe and requirements.

correctElements.evidence: The tutorial window is docked to the left edge of the map content, right of any left rail, matching the wireframe's left-side panel placement.
The window has a fixed title 'Tutorial Mode' at the top, consistent with the wireframe.
Dark starfield background with green borders and semi-transparent panels, matching the specified style in both actual and wireframe.
Stable footer buttons (Back, Next, End) are present at the bottom of the tutorial window, aligning with the wireframe's button placement.
Map Key is positioned on the right side, matching the wireframe's right panel.

incorrectElements.expected: Production Phase (as in wireframe)
incorrectElements.actual: Purchase Phase
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: The phase name differs, which may indicate a mismatch in the game state or tutorial context, affecting visual satisfaction of the screen description.

incorrectElements.expected: BACK, NEXT / APPLY (as in wireframe)
incorrectElements.actual: Back, Next, End
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Button labels and count do not match; wireframe shows 'NEXT / APPLY' combined, while actual has separate 'Next' and 'End', potentially altering user-facing behavior.

incorrectElements.expected: Bounded scroll content placeholder
incorrectElements.actual: Detailed text sections including 'Step 1 of 14', 'Boot the command deck', actions, and path list
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe uses a generic placeholder, but actual has specific content; while layout matches, the wireframe lacks detail to validate exact text and sections.

incorrectElements.expected: Sirius, Arcturus, Canopus with connections
incorrectElements.actual: Arcturus, Canopus with connection, no Sirius
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Map in actual screenshot misses 'Sirius' present in wireframe, indicating a content mismatch in the gameplay map visualization.

incorrectElements.expected: No close button shown in wireframe
incorrectElements.actual: X close button present in title bar
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual includes an extra control not represented in the wireframe, which could affect z-order or user interaction not accounted for in the baseline.

incorrectElements.expected: POP 100, MET 50, FUEL 50 (static in wireframe)
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual includes increment indicators not present in wireframe, adding extra text that may imply dynamic behavior not validated by the static wireframe.

incorrectElements.expected: Exact pixel match at 1536x832
incorrectElements.actual: Visual similarity but potential DPI/scaling differences or minor rendering artifacts
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: As a residual risk, image comparison may not detect subtle DPI or scaling issues without pixel-level analysis, even though visuals appear close.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe captures the overall layout, docking, and style effectively for basic validation, but uses placeholders instead of specific content, has incorrect button labels, and mismatched map details, limiting its ability to fully validate detailed user-facing behavior and exact text requirements.
missingRequirements: Detailed tutorial text and section boundaries for content validation
Accurate representation of dynamic elements like resource increments
Exact footer button configuration including 'End' vs 'APPLY'
recommendedWireframeChanges: Replace placeholders with sample tutorial content to match expected sections
Update buttons to Back/Next/End for consistency with requirements
Correct phase name to 'Purchase Phase' if that's the intended tutorial state
Include close button in title bar if it's a required element
